description.value: Aura moderate evocation; CL 8th; Slot none; Price 32,000 gp; Weight 5 lbs. DESCRIPTION This staff is made from high-quality wood and festooned with brass rods and keys, looking almost like an instrument. The staff allows use of the following spells: Ghost sound (1 charge) Piercing shriek (1 charge) Sculpt sound (2 charges) Wall of sound (2 charges) In addition, as a swift action, the wielder of the musical staff can cause it to transform into a string or wind instrument. Any Perform skill checks made with the musical staff gain a +5 competence bonus. The staff can still be used to cast spells while it is an instrument, and it can revert back to a staff as a free action. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Staff; Spells ghost sound, piercing shriek, sculpt sound, wall of sound; Cost 16,000 gp.
